name: Neptune 200 CWWW

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F2156E6F-D4AC-409D-86E8-3FE1CFFBE9FA

comment:
Neptune 200 CW+WW: Triton Blue Neptune 200 CW+WW LED PANEL 200W + 3200 + 5600K 130º. 
Large panel size, but lightweight with high luminous power 200W. 224 (5730 SMD) LED 0.5W warm white + 224 (5730 SMD)
LED 0.5W cold white
High CRI, but no noise
Functional and professional for all types of spaces such as photography and video recording in studios, TV sets, outdoor interviews, filming, live broadcasting and of course for stages.
DMX control
